We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 3.11s, d = 61.81m:
t^2 = 3.11 * 3.11:
3.11 * 0.01 = 0.0311
3.11 * 0.10 = 0.3110
3.11 * 3.00 = 9.3300
0.0311 + 0.3110 = 0.3421
0.3421 + 9.3300 = 9.6721
k = 61.81 / 3.11^2 = 61.81 / 9.6721 = 61.810 / 9.672
= 0 + 1 * 61810 / 9672
= 1 + 1 * 52138 / 9672
= 2 + 1 * 42466 / 9672
= 3 + 1 * 32794 / 9672
= 4 + 1 * 23122 / 9672
= 5 + 1 * 13450 / 9672
= 6 + 1 * 3778 / 9672
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 37780 / 9672
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 28108 / 9672
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 18436 / 9672
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 8764 / 9672
= 6.30 + 0.01 * 87640 / 9672
= 6.31 + 0.01 * 77968 / 9672
= 6.32 + 0.01 * 68296 / 9672
= 6.33 + 0.01 * 58624 / 9672
= 6.34 + 0.01 * 48952 / 9672
= 6.35 + 0.01 * 39280 / 9672
= 6.36 + 0.01 * 29608 / 9672
= 6.37 + 0.01 * 19936 / 9672
= 6.38 + 0.01 * 10264 / 9672
= 6.39 + 0.01 * 592 / 9672
= 6.390 + 0.001 * 5920 / 9672
= 6.390

t = 3.2s, d = 65.43m:
t^2 = 3.2 * 3.2:
3.2 * 0.2 = 0.64
3.2 * 3.0 = 9.60
0.64 + 9.60 = 10.24
k = 65.43 / 3.2^2 = 65.43 / 10.24 = 65.43 / 10.24
= 0 + 1 * 6543 / 1024
= 1 + 1 * 5519 / 1024
= 2 + 1 * 4495 / 1024
= 3 + 1 * 3471 / 1024
= 4 + 1 * 2447 / 1024
= 5 + 1 * 1423 / 1024
= 6 + 1 * 399 / 1024
= 6.0 + 0.1 * 3990 / 1024
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 2966 / 1024
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 1942 / 1024
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 918 / 1024
= 6.30 + 0.01 * 9180 / 1024
= 6.31 + 0.01 * 8156 / 1024
= 6.32 + 0.01 * 7132 / 1024
= 6.33 + 0.01 * 6108 / 1024
= 6.34 + 0.01 * 5084 / 1024
= 6.35 + 0.01 * 4060 / 1024
= 6.36 + 0.01 * 3036 / 1024
= 6.37 + 0.01 * 2012 / 1024
= 6.38 + 0.01 * 988 / 1024
= 6.380 + 0.001 * 9880 / 1024
= 6.381 + 0.001 * 8856 / 1024
= 6.382 + 0.001 * 7832 / 1024
= 6.383 + 0.001 * 6808 / 1024
= 6.384 + 0.001 * 5784 / 1024
= 6.385 + 0.001 * 4760 / 1024
= 6.386 + 0.001 * 3736 / 1024
= 6.387 + 0.001 * 2712 / 1024
= 6.388 + 0.001 * 1688 / 1024
= 6.389 + 0.001 * 664 / 1024
= 6.389

t = 1.37s, d = 11.99m:
t^2 = 1.37 * 1.37:
1.37 * 0.07 = 0.0959
1.37 * 0.30 = 0.4110
1.37 * 1.00 = 1.3700
0.0959 + 0.4110 = 0.5069
0.5069 + 1.3700 = 1.8769
k = 11.99 / 1.37^2 = 11.99 / 1.8769 = 11.990 / 1.876
= 0 + 1 * 11990 / 1876
= 1 + 1 * 10114 / 1876
= 2 + 1 * 8238 / 1876
= 3 + 1 * 6362 / 1876

= 6.32 + 0.01 * 13368 / 1876

= 6.35 + 0.01 * 7740 / 1876

= 6.37 + 0.01 * 3988 / 1876
= 6.38 + 0.01 * 2112 / 1876

= 6.390 + 0.001 * 2360 / 1876
= 6.391 + 0.001 * 484 / 1876
= 6.391

t = 3.31s, d = 70.01m:
t^2 = 3.31 * 3.31:
3.31 * 0.01 = 0.0331
3.31 * 0.30 = 0.9930
3.31 * 3.00 = 9.9300
0.0331 + 0.9930 = 1.0261
1.0261 + 9.9300 = 10.9561
k = 70.01 / 3.31^2 = 70.01 / 10.9561 = 70.010 / 10.956
= 0 + 1 * 70010 / 10956
= 1 + 1 * 59054 / 10956
= 2 + 1 * 48098 / 10956
= 3 + 1 * 37142 / 10956
= 4 + 1 * 26186 / 10956
= 5 + 1 * 15230 / 10956

= 6.0 + 0.1 * 42740 / 10956
= 6.1 + 0.1 * 31784 / 10956
= 6.2 + 0.1 * 20828 / 10956
= 6.3 + 0.1 * 9872 / 10956
= 6.30 + 0.01 * 98720 / 10956
= 6.31 + 0.01 * 87764 / 10956
= 6.32 + 0.01 * 76808 / 10956
= 6.33 + 0.01 * 65852 / 10956
= 6.34 + 0.01 * 54896 / 10956
= 6.35 + 0.01 * 43940 / 10956
= 6.36 + 0.01 * 32984 / 10956
= 6.37 + 0.01 * 22028 / 10956
= 6.38 + 0.01 * 11072 / 10956
= 6.39 + 0.01 * 116 / 10956
= 6.390 + 0.001 * 1160 / 10956
= 6.390

k values: 6.390, 6.389, 6.391, 6.390
k values (sorted): 6.389, 6.390, 6.390, 6.391
The median k is 6.390.

For t = 3.31:
t^2 = 3.31 * 3.31:
3.31 * 0.01 = 0.0331
3.31 * 0.30 = 0.9930
3.31 * 3.00 = 9.9300
0.0331 + 0.9930 = 1.0261
1.0261 + 9.9300 = 10.9561
= 10.9561

d = 6.39 * 10.9561:
6.39 * 0.0001 = 0.000639
6.39 * 0.0060 = 0.038340
6.39 * 0.0500 = 0.319500
6.39 * 0.9000 = 5.751000
6.39 * 10.0000 = 63.900000
0.000639 + 0.038340 = 0.038979
0.038979 + 0.319500 = 0.358479
0.358479 + 5.751000 = 6.109479
6.109479 + 63.900000 = 70.009479
= 70.009

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{70.009}
